key_event.1880-1889: Weak Qajar central rule dependent on tribes and clergy
key_event.1910-1919: WWI occupation, Majlis dissolution, famine collapse central authority
key_event.1920-1929: Reza Khan's 1921 coup and Pahlavi state centralization
key_event.1930-1939: Reza Shah's despotic centralization: tribes disarmed, clergy crushed
key_event.1940-1949: Reza Shah's abdication, occupation, and open pluralist politics
key_event.1950-1959: 1953 coup crushes Mosaddegh, restores despotic Pahlavi state
key_event.1960-1969: White Revolution and SAVAK consolidate a Despotic Leviathan
key_event.1970-1979: 1979 Islamic Revolution topples the Pahlavi state
key_event.1980-1989: Clerical consolidation, Iran-Iraq War, and purge of opposition
key_event.1990-1999: 1997 Khatami landslide and reformist civil society surge
key_event.2000-2009: Reformist defeat, IRGC/oil-rent consolidation, 2009 Green Movement crushed
key_event.2010-2019: Green Movement crushed; Bloody November lethal repression
